content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_INVOCA_CALL_DETAIL_RECORD]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_INVOCA_CALL_DETAIL_RECORD]
( 
	[CallRecordID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransactionType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[MediaType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallSourceDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PromoNumberDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PromoNumberId] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Region] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[QualifiedRegions] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[RepeatCaller] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PhoneType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallStartTime_UTC_TS] [bigint]  NULL,
	[CallStartTime_NW_TZ] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TransferType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[VerifiedZipCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EndOfCallReason] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DestinationPhoneNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileInvocaID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileCampaignInvocaID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileCampaignID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProfileCampaignName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[TotalDuration] [bigint]  NULL,
	[ConnectedDuration] [bigint]  NULL,
	[IVRDuration] [bigint]  NULL,
	[KeyPresses] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [TransactionID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
